title: Uriel Pack
description: Uriel Pack is a 1.13 - 1.21 texture pack designed for anarchic Minecraft servers, specially adapted to CrystalPvP environments.
body:
Uriel Pack is a 1.13 - 1.21 texture pack designed for anarchic Minecraft servers, specially adapted to CrystalPvP environments. It subtly enhances the game by altering the totem texture, modifying various sounds such as totem popping, explosions, xp bottle throwing and adding some more refined details to enrich the player experience. Its textures contain a not too drastic change, offering a unique visual enhancement, making it an option for players looking for a fresh but unobtrusive change in their game.

![Part of the content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3564c95b83b90ad0f1dd47436d18287ac70f2a08.jpeg)
